narrative.description: Hideo Kojima's PS1 stealth landmark blends cinematic storytelling with Soliton radar evasion, codec conversations, boss duels, and multi-route infiltration of Shadow Moses Island.
narrative.core_loop: Sneak through enemy patrols, avoid or neutralize guards, solve environmental puzzles, and confront FOXHOUND members in set-piece boss encounters.

mechanics.map_notes: Alert phases escalate from caution to combat based on sight and sound.
mechanics.expression: Alert phases escalate from caution to combat based on sight and sound.

mechanics.map_notes: Story advances through discrete infiltration chapters with unique objectives.
mechanics.expression: Story advances through discrete infiltration chapters with unique objectives.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Psycho Mantis and Sniper Wolf telegraph attack windows.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Psycho Mantis and Sniper Wolf telegraph attack windows.

mechanics.map_notes: Each FOXHOUND fight demands unique counter-strategies.
mechanics.expression: Each FOXHOUND fight demands unique counter-strategies.

mechanics.map_notes: Metal Gear REX fight spans multiple arena configurations.
mechanics.expression: Metal Gear REX fight spans multiple arena configurations.

mechanics.map_notes: CQC takedowns offer silent guard removal.
mechanics.expression: CQC takedowns offer silent guard removal.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden items, codec secrets, and multiple difficulty modes extend replay.
mechanics.expression: Hidden items, codec secrets, and multiple difficulty modes extend replay.

mechanics.map_notes: Infrared floors, gas chambers, and timed escapes constrain routes.
mechanics.expression: Infrared floors, gas chambers, and timed escapes constrain routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Life bar depletes from gunfire and boss hits.
mechanics.expression: Life bar depletes from gunfire and boss hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Save stations with codec frequency checkpoint progress.
mechanics.expression: Save stations with codec frequency checkpoint progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Firearms fire on trigger with ammo scarcity pressure.
mechanics.expression: Firearms fire on trigger with ammo scarcity pressure.

mechanics.map_notes: Codec and item menus require deliberate input during real-time play.
mechanics.expression: Codec and item menus require deliberate input during real-time play.

mechanics.map_notes: Defeating FOXHOUND members unlocks subsequent story areas.
mechanics.expression: Defeating FOXHOUND members unlocks subsequent story areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Vent crawling and precision jumps occur from first-person crawl spaces.
mechanics.expression: Vent crawling and precision jumps occur from first-person crawl spaces.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Metal Gear Solid through its core stealth loop.
